name: Interspace Co.,Ltd.
summary: Interspace Co.,Ltd. provides Internet advertising and media services in Japan. The company offers ACCESSTRADE, an affiliate platform; Store Front Affiliate, a real store type affiliate service; X-lift, a content recommendation platform; and ACCESSTRADE CALLAFFY, a performance-based advertisement service by telephone tracking. It also provides mamastadium, an information Website for Moms; Yoga Journal Online, a yoga and beauty online news media for yoga news and lifestyle; and Native app, including various smartphone applications for women, such as health, fortune telling, and love simulation games. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
